summary: One-to-one chat website where users can connect using unique code numbers
architectural_notes: WebSocket or similar real-time communication protocol needed for chat
Database schema: users table with unique code field, messages table for chat history

existing_features.title: Create a user registration system that generates a unique numeric code for each user upon signup
Implement a connection system where users can find and connect with other users by entering their unique code number
Build a one-to-one chat interface where connected users can send and receive text messages in real-time

Design a modern, user-friendly chat interface with a clean messaging aesthetic using warm, inviting colors like coral and teal, rounded message bubbles, and clear visual hierarchy for sender/receiver messages
Display the user's own unique code prominently in the interface so they can share it with others

new_feature_requests.summary: Unique code generation for each user
